growth_records.cite: Weiss, Anna S. et al. In vitro interaction network of a synthetic gut bacterial community. The ISME Journal (2022). DOI:10.1038/s41396-021-01153-z. [PMC8941000]
growth_records.snippet: intermediate growth rate (GR > 1 h-1, ... E. clostridioformis YL32 ...) ... Both Lachnospiraceae strains generated high amounts of acetic acid ... lactate production was confirmed for ... E. clostridioformis YL32.
growth_records.notes: growth_rate 1.0 h-1 = lower bound of 'intermediate' bin (exact in Table S2, unavailable). Lachnospiraceae: high acetate + lactate (qualitative, MS). No numeric rates.
